title: Empogona macrophylla
taxonomy: Empogona macrophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Empogona, which contains several other species of plants. The plant is native to tropical Africa and is commonly found in areas with high humidity and rainfall. Empogona macrophylla is a type of tree or shrub that can grow to varying heights depending on the environment. The plant's classification is further refined to the species level due to its unique characteristics and differences from other Empogona species.
